message:
web: Remove unused start.ts middleware file

The start.ts file with createStart middleware was dead code - it was
only imported as a type but never executed at runtime. TanStack Start
doesn't require this file; it's optional and only needed for global
middleware configuration.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/672e1869-38d7-4e87-9ac3-9d1348d1f7c2
